Metadata.title: MareVela Parking | San Marco di Castellabate
Metadata.description: Your front-row seat to the sea. 24/7 parking near Pozzillo beach.

Hero.subtitle: San Marco di Castellabate
Hero.title: The privilege of arriving. Your exclusive parking spot steps from the sea.
Hero.description: Your reserved spot in the front row for Pozzillo beach. An exclusive, safe, and stress-free parking experience.

Features.title: The MareVela Experience
Features.subtitle: Not just a parking lot, but the perfect start to your day at the beach. A premium service designed for those who seek utmost convenience.

feature1.title: Open 24/7
feature1.desc: Guaranteed accessibility at all times, with staff always ready to welcome you, day and night.

feature2.title: Security & Discretion
feature2.desc: A secure and guarded area where you can leave your vehicle with complete peace of mind.

feature3.title: Prime Location
feature3.desc: Located right at the start of the Waikiki descent, just a few meters from the renowned Pozzillo beach.

feature4.title: Premium Service
feature4.desc: Hospitality refined down to the smallest detail to make you feel on vacation from the very first moment.

Pricing.title: Our Rates
Pricing.subtitle: Choose the level of service you prefer. Transparent rates for an unparalleled experience.

Contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Vehicle type, estimated time of arrival...

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know for a worry-free stay.
FAQ.q1: Is the parking lot open 24 hours a day?
FAQ.a1: Yes, our parking lot is guarded and accessible 24/7, with staff always on-site.
FAQ.a2: Absolutely. The entire area is covered by 24/7 video surveillance and is always manned by our staff to ensure maximum security for your vehicle.
FAQ.q3: How far are the main tourist attractions from the parking lot?
FAQ.a3:
We are in a highly central and strategic location:
• Pozzillo Beach (Waikiki descent): 0 minutes (you're already there)
• San Marco Tourist Port (Yacht & Boat Charter): 12 min walk
• Punta Licosa Nature Trail: 12 min walk (trailhead at the Port)
• Submerged Roman Pier (Underwater Archaeology): 15 min walk
FAQ.q4: Can I reserve a parking space in advance?
FAQ.a4: Certainly. We strongly recommend booking in advance, especially during the summer months. You can easily contact us via WhatsApp to reserve your spot.
FAQ.q5: Is it possible to park large vehicles?
FAQ.a5: For SUVs, vans, or particularly large vehicles, please contact us in advance so we can assign you the most comfortable and suitable space.

Footer.description: Excellence in hospitality in San Marco di Castellabate. Your luxury parking spot just steps from the sea.
Footer.alwaysOpen: 7 days a week, all year round.
